style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration, rust-red accented, of a security analyst at a desk in daylight studying a stylized application drawn as a small fortress and network diagram, tracing authorized test-probe lines against its outer wall and marking the exposed entry points on a chart. A professional scene conveying authorized offensive security testing, mapping where a system is weak so it can be strengthened. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear rust-red accent, archival print quality, no text.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial illustration, rust-red accented, of a security analyst at a desk in daylight studying a stylized application drawn as a small fortress and network diagram, tracing authorized test-probe lines against its outer wall and marking the exposed entry points on a chart. A professional scene conveying authorized offensive security testing, mapping where a system is weak so it can be strengthened. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear rust-red accent, archival print quality, no text.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
